series_metadata.series_title: NOTICE OF IMPROPERLY COMPLETED SALES TAX
series_metadata.series_description: Request for additional information necessary to complete proper filing of sales tax returns.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years then destroy by shredding. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain in office 2 years then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
